name: Mango Pudding LF
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the skin and pit from the mango, then scoop out the flesh.
2. Place the mango pulp in a blender and puree until smooth.
3. Add the orange juice, lime juice, and tofu to the blender and purée again.
4. Stir in the brown sugar.
5. Pour the mixture into a serving bowl and chill for at least one hour before serving.
(Note: This recipe is based on the original posting by Roberta Bell on 16 May 1997.)
